Bash(cd /c/Users/TroyPound/projects/psa-dashboard/backend && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/metrics.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

print\('=== ALL CONTRACTS ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT contract_id, client_name, contract_type, contract_name, status FROM client_contracts ORDER BY client_name, contract_name'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"client_name\\"]:30s} | type={r[\\"contract_type\\"]:10s} | name={r[\\"contract_name\\"]} | status={r[\\"status\\"]}'\)

print\(f'\\nTotal contracts: {len\(rows\)}'\)
print\(\)

print\('=== UNIQUE CONTRACT TYPES ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT contract_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM client_contracts GROUP BY contract_type'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== UNIQUE CONTRACT NAMES ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT contract_name, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM client_contracts GROUP BY contract_name ORDER BY cnt DESC'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== CLIENT PLANS \(from custom field\) ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT plan, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM clients WHERE plan IS NOT NULL GROUP BY plan ORDER BY cnt DESC'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}'\)
")
